scripts.db:push:
echo '
❌ db:push is DISABLED. It bypasses migration history and desyncs prod.
   Use:  pnpm --filter @repo/database db:migrate:dev --name <descriptive>
' && exit 1
scripts.db:migrate:check:
prisma migrate diff --from-schema-datasource prisma/schema.prisma --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --exit-code || (echo '
❌ DB schema drifts from schema.prisma — someone bypassed migrations (likely with db push).
   Fix by generating a migration:  pnpm --filter @repo/database db:migrate:dev --name <descriptive>
' && exit 1)
